data.title: Fix: recipe-registry-schema not/required constraint lacks documentation on prohibit semantics
data.description: The 'not: {required: ["cli_command_template"]}' constraint in recipe-registry-schema.json correctly prohibits the cli_command_template property in JSON Schema Draft 7, but its semantics are non-obvious. Most engineers will assume it only affects required-ness, not presence. A description field or inline comment explaining that this construct prohibits the property entirely (and why cli_command_template is banned) would prevent future maintainers from removing the constraint or misunderstanding its purpose. File: recipes/schemas/recipe-registry-schema.json
